Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add custom model management with API suggestions

- Add Migration 2: customModels array in storage schema
- Remove hardcoded model options from dropdown
- Add "Manage Models" modal with:
  - Saved models list with delete buttons
  - "Fetch Available Models" from Anthropic /v1/models API
  - Available models grid with one-click add
  - Manual add form for custom model ID + display name
- Populate dropdown dynamically from customModels
- Update getModelDisplayName\(\) to use customModels lookup
- Add comprehensive CSS for modal and model management UI

Users now start with empty model list and can:
- Fetch available models from API \(requires API key\)
- Manually add any model ID with custom display name
- Delete models they no longer need

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add Google Gemini API support with per-provider configuration

- Add schema migration \(v3\) for per-provider API keys and models
- Implement callGoogleAPI\(\) with message format conversion
- Add fetchGoogleModels\(\) for Google model discovery
- Update model management to store models per provider
- Enable Google \(Gemini\) option in provider dropdown
- Add handleProviderChange\(\) for seamless provider switching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add model parameter controls for advanced API settings

- Add schema migration \(v4\) for modelParams storage
- Add Advanced Settings section in sidebar with:
  - Temperature, Top P, Top K, Max Tokens controls
  - Stop sequences tag input
  - Streaming toggle \(UI only\)
- Add Claude-specific: Extended Thinking toggle with budget
- Add Gemini-specific: Thinking Level, Media Resolution, Safety Settings
- Update API calls to use configured parameters
- Provider-specific sections auto-show/hide on switch

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
